name: The Law Offices of Stuart B. Handelman, P.C.
description_short: Chicago-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, led by attorney Stuart B. Handelman with multiple office locations and a focus on personalized client service.
description_long: Stuart B. Handelman's law practice is a bankruptcy-focused firm operating in the Chicago area with multiple office locations. The firm was recognized with a Clients' Choice Award in 2022 and maintains an online presence at chicagolandbankruptcy.com. The practice appears to have been established for at least a decade based on client testimonials dating back to 2013. The firm operates with a team that includes named attorneys Jean Huang and Kelly Smith, along with legal support staff. What the firm offers includes comprehensive bankruptcy representation for both Chapter 7 (liquidation) and Chapter 13 (reorganization) filings. The website emphasizes free video consultations, convenient online appointment scheduling, and multiple office locations to reduce client burden. They provide bankruptcy resources and counseling as part of their service offerings. The firm distinguishes itself through extensive client testimonials highlighting personalized attention, responsiveness, and emotional support during what clients describe as a stressful process. Multiple reviews specifically praise individual staff members by name (Jean Huang, Kelly Smith, Desiree Glapion) for professionalism, patience, and availability. The firm emphasizes that clients receive dedicated attention despite handling hundreds of cases. Long-term client relationships are mentioned, with one client noting the attorney remained available for counsel three years after case completion. An honest assessment notes that while the website provides strong social proof through detailed testimonials, specific pricing information is not displayed and appears to require direct contact. The firm markets 'non-bankruptcy options' but does not detail what these alternatives entail on the available website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple named staff members (Jean Huang, Kelly Smith, Desiree Glapion) praised individually in recent testimonials for competence and professionalism
Free video consultation option reduces barriers to initial legal consultation
Multiple office locations ('see our locations' mentioned) and online appointment scheduling for client convenience
Consistent 5-star review rating emphasized on homepage
Long-term client relationships evidenced by attorney availability for post-case counsel
Testimonials span multiple years (2013-2022) suggesting sustained practice stability
Direct phone line (312-360-0500) with apparent responsiveness mentioned in reviews
cons: No pricing or fee structure disclosed on website; requires direct contact for cost information
Limited detail on 'non-bankruptcy options' advertised on homepage—unclear what alternatives are offered
Website contains multiple incomplete placeholder sections ('Slide title' / 'Write your caption here') suggesting lack of current maintenance
No information about attorney credentials, bar standing, or professional affiliations displayed
Testimonials are unverified and lack dates of service completion for some entries
best_for: Chicago-area residents considering Chapter 7 liquidation bankruptcy with preference for personalized, name-attorney representation
Chapter 13 reorganization filers seeking supportive counsel through multi-year repayment plans
Consumers preferring online consultation and appointment options to minimize in-person office visits
Individuals prioritizing responsiveness and direct access to named attorneys over large firm anonymity
diagnosis: Best for Chicago-area consumers actively considering personal bankruptcy (Chapter 7 or 13) who value personalized attorney-client relationships and prefer flexible consultation options. Primary caveat: website lacks transparent pricing and specific details about advertised non-bankruptcy alternatives, requiring direct contact to understand full service scope and cost structure before engagement.
services: Case-related phone, email, and in-office communication
Non-bankruptcy debt options consultation (details not specified)
Payment plans for legal fees (indicated by 'MAKE PAYMENT' link)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 30 N Michigan Ave Ste 1603, Chicago, IL 60602
